for_sales.sales_text:
Built from a Dartington Boatworks Hull to a  Nigel Irnes design,finished as a single handed sailing boat. Nigel Irnens Roxane Hull Louisa May is of round bilge GRP construction with gunter rig, lifting centre board, transom and skeg mounted rudder. Accomodation consists of an open cabin with forward double berth, galley to port and navigation area to starboard.

38 foot long  and 29 foot 6 on deck. Aluminium mast, Carbon Gunt, 9 foot beam 2 foot 6 minimum and 5 foot 9 maximum draft

Set up for single handed sailing

Built in 2018

Bow Sprite retractable

Double birth in the forward cabin, composting head and basin in head area. In the Saloon two single births, folding table, two burner gimble gas stove with oven and grill, camping fridge. Brooks and gatehouse chart plotter with AIS, depth sounder, 325 amp hour battery bank, two solar panels, Sympson and Lawrence anchor winch.

Biggest mirror dinghy rig in the world (gunter) Top down furlers on both head sails, controlled from the cockpit.  Large screecher sail. Jiffy reefing on Main sail. Permanent boarding ladder at stern. New re-conditioned Inboard 20 horsepower Kubota installed in 2025 with re-conditioned gearbox. Four man Rubber dinghy, Two man GRP dinghy stored on fore deck, (Out of date life raft - five man) This boat is a labour of love for the builder with some parts self-built Have undertaken professional consultation regarding all motor and electronic Great value

Reluctant sale due to ill health

boat.full_description: Louisa May is of round bilge GRP construction with gunter rig, lifting centre board, transom and skeg mounted rudder. Accomodation consists of an open cabin with forward double berth, galley to port and navigation area to starboard.
boat.name: Louisa May
boat.short_description: Hull found on eBay, Some professional build some home build
